ddls:
CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "director_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes the director has */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Director's Twitter username */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* Director's Instagram username */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* Director's Facebook username */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Information about awards and nominations the director has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "actor_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes the actor has */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the actor */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Actor's Twitter username */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* Actor's Instagram username */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* Actor's Facebook username */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Information about awards and nominations the actor has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "content_rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the production company's official website */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Production company's Twitter username */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* Production company's Instagram username */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* Production company's Facebook username */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the distributor was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the distributor's official website */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Distributor's Twitter username */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* Distributor's Instagram username */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* Distributor's Facebook username */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* User's Twitter username */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* User's Instagram username */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* User's Facebook username */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critic_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the critic who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the critic (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., New York Times, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critic_reviews_critic_id FOREIGN KEY ("critic_id") REFERENCES critics ("critic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critics" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "critic_name" TEXT /* Full name of the critic */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the critic */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Critic's Twitter username */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* Critic's Instagram username */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* Critic's Facebook username */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the critic (e.g., newspaper, magazine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id")
)
